1000663325.english: - Hirume was watching me with a strange expression.
1000663325.korean: - 히루메는 묘한 표정으로 이쪽을 바라보고 있었다.

1000663327.korean: 무, 무슨 소리를 하는 거냐, 그대는!

1000663328.english: - Hirume covered herself and stepped back from me.
1000663328.korean: - 히루메는 자신의 몸을 가리며 나와 거리를 벌렸다.

1000663329.english: - I was sure she'd be longing for my touch…
1000663329.korean: - 분명 내 손길을 그리워할 거라고 생각했는데…

1000663330.english: - I wanted to stroke her tail and say, "Hehe, your mouth says no but your tail is honest."
1000663330.korean: - 꼬리를 쓰다듬어주면서 ‘으헤헤, 입은 싫다고 하지만 꼬리는 정직하군.’이라고 말하고 싶었는데…

1000663332.english: - Hirume, who had stepped back, closed the distance again.
1000663332.korean: - 거리를 벌리던 히루메가 다시 거리를 좁혔다.

1000663334.english: No! Cease your stroking at once!

1000663337.english: Between you and Daika, there is a peculiar aura.
1000663337.korean: 다이카와 그대 사이에서 묘한 기운이 흐르고 있구나.

1000663338.english: That is something I must divine right now.

1000663340.english: - I followed Hirume into the shrine.

1000663342.english: - Following Hirume's instruction, I sat on the floor. Hachiko sat beside me as well.
1000663342.korean: - 히루메의 지시에 따라 바닥에 앉았다. 덤으로 하치코도 내 옆에 앉았다.

1000663343.english: From this moment, I shall divine the bond between you and Daika.

1000663344.english: - Hirume put twigs into a wooden container, shook it, then scattered them across the floor.
1000663344.korean: - 히루메는 나무로 된 통에 나뭇가지를 넣고 흔들다가 그것들을 바닥에 뿌렸다.

1000663346.english: I have cast many readings about bonds, but never one so favorable.
1000663346.korean: 내가 인연에 대한 점을 여럿 쳐봤지만 이렇게 좋은 점괘는 처음이다.

1000663347.english: Of course, not as favorable as the one between you and your concubine…

1000663349.english: You love each other deeply, so no hardship will overcome you.
1000663349.korean: 서로를 깊이 사랑하니 무슨 고난이 닥치더라도 이길 수 있으리라.

1000663350.english: Of course, you and your concubine have already overcome every trial.
1000663350.korean: 물론 그대와 첩은 이미 모든 역경을 이겨냈지만 말이다.

1000663351.english: Even if separated, you are fated to meet again without fail.
1000663351.korean: 헤어짐이 있어도 기필코 다시 만날 운수로다.

1000663352.english: Of course, you and your concubine are bound not just in this life, but since past lives.
1000663352.korean: 물론 그대와 첩은 현생뿐만 아니라 전생에서부터 이어졌지만 말이다.

1000663353.english: There may be quarrels in life, but love will leave no grudges behind.
1000663353.korean: 살다 보면 싸움은 피할 수 없겠지만 애정이 있으니 앙금은 남지 않을 게다.

1000663354.english: Of course, you and your concubine are so harmonious you have no reason to fight.
1000663354.korean: 물론 그대와 첩은 싸울 일조차 없을 정도로 돈독하지만 말이다.

1000663356.english: But this is the first time Hachiko has seen fortune-telling like this.
1000663356.korean: 그런데 하치코는 이렇게 점 보는 거 처음 봐요.

1000663357.english: Th-that's only because Hachiko h-hasn't learned it yet!
1000663357.korean: 그, 그건 하치코가 아, 아직 안 배워서 그런 것이니라.

1000663359.english: Not as much as you and your concubine, but still the most auspicious of bonds.
1000663359.korean: 그대와 첩만큼은 아니지만 그래도 최고로 길한 사이이니라.

1000663360.english: - After receiving Hirume's fortune and looking around the shrine a bit, I left.
1000663360.korean: - 히루메에게 점을 보고, 신사를 조금 둘러본 후에 신사를 떠났다.

1000663361.english: Have the Commander and Miss Daika gone already?

1000663363.english: Hmm… then shall we have some snacks?

1000663364.english: There just happens to be some premium sweets in the fridge.

1000663367.english: I wonder where those premium sweets came from?

1000663368.english: Th-they're… the f-fruits of my labor!

1000663369.english: Hehe, fruits of labor, you say. Or perhaps payment of a different kind?
1000663369.korean: 후후, 노동의 대가일까요. 아니면 다른 대가일까요?

1000663371.english: Hachiko. Brew some tea. Since these are fine sweets, make it fine tea to match.
1000663371.korean: 하치코. 차를 끓여오세요. 좋은 과자니까 거기에 어울리는 좋은 차로요.

1000663375.english: You know, there's such a thing as hush-drink in this world.

1000663378.english: If a claim comes in later, I'll help you.

1000663379.english: ……Don't you know that if you get in the way of someone's love, you'll get kicked by a horse?
1000663379.korean: ……남의 사랑을 방해하면 말에 차이는 거 모르시나요?

1000663381.english: Seeing myself giving such silly advice… I really must have become a fool…
1000663381.korean: 이런 얼빠진 충고나 하는 것을 보면 나도 진짜 바보가 다 됐네...

1000663383.english: - After leaving the shrine and wandering idly…
1000663383.korean: - 신사를 떠난 후 적당히 어슬렁거릴 때…

1000663385.english: - From under a black rag, Circe poked her head out.

1000663386.english: Could it be that you couldn't forget me and came for another reading?
1000663386.korean: 저를 잊지 못하고 또 점 보러 오신 건가요?

1000663387.english: You're my second customer after the first one~ wow~
1000663387.korean: 첫 번째에 이어 두 번째 손님이시기도 하네요~ 와아~

1000663388.english: - Two weeks have passed since last time and yet nobody has come…
1000663388.korean: - 지난 번에 오고 2주가 지났는데도 아무도 안 오다니…

1000663389.english: Customer, you didn't forget the promise to spread word about me, did you?
1000663389.korean: 손님. 혹시 소문 내준다는 약속 잊으신 건 아닌가요?

1000663390.english: - As I thought about Setting her up with a proper tent later…
1000663390.korean: - 나중에 제대로 된 천막을 세워주자고 생각할 때…

1000663392.english: - Circe looked at me and Daika, then said:

1000663393.english: Shall I read the fortune of your romance today?
1000663393.korean: 오늘은 두 사람의 연애 운을 봐드리면 될까요?

1000663394.english: - Before we could answer, Circe pulled us inside the ragged tent.
1000663394.korean: - 우리가 뭐라고 답하기도 전에 키르케는 우리를 거적데기 안으로 끌어들였다.

1000663395.english: Well then~ let's see. The romance fortune of you two is…
1000663395.korean: 자~ 어디 볼까요? 두 사람의 연애 운은…

1000663396.english: - Circe placed her hand on the crystal ball and began divining.
1000663396.korean: - 키르케는 수정구에 손을 얹고 점을 치기 시작했다.

1000663397.english: - In the cramped and dark tent, Daika and I sat shoulder to shoulder, watching Circe divine.
1000663397.korean: - 비좁고 어두운 거적데기 안에서 다이카와 나는 어깨를 맞댄 채 키르케가 점을 치는 것을 봤다.

1000663401.english: In my entire career as a fortune-teller, I've never seen one this good!
1000663401.korean: 저의 점쟁이 경력에서 이렇게 좋은 적은 없어요!

1000663402.english: If this had come up before humanity's downfall…

1000663403.english: If you were an unmarried couple, I'd say you'd never regret getting married.
1000663403.korean: 아직 결혼하지 않은 연인사이라면 결혼해도 후회하지 않을 거라고 말했을 거고.

1000663404.english: If you were already married, I'd say only death could part you.
1000663404.korean: 결혼한 사이라면 죽음만이 두 사람을 갈라놓을 수 있을 거라고 말했을 거고.

1000663405.english: If you were an adulterous pair, I'd tell you to consult a lawyer.
1000663405.korean: 만약에 불륜을 저지르는 사이였다면… 변호사랑 상담을 해보라고 했을 거예요.

1000663406.english: And if it's between a human and a Bioroid…

1000663408.english: - Circe's face showed an unreadable expression.
1000663408.korean: - 키르케는 알 수 없는 표정을 지었다.

1000663409.english: - But soon she returned to her usual smile.

1000663410.english: Haha, for now there's no problem, is there? You love each other so much.
1000663410.korean: 하하, 지금은 아무런 문제가 없죠? 이렇게 사랑하는 사이인데.

1000663414.english: Destined partners. Fated lovers. Mushy couple. Soulmates. Any word for good lovers would fit.
1000663414.korean: 천생연분. 천생가연. 닭살커플. 소울메이트. 좋은 연인을 뜻하는 단어 아무거나 붙여도 될 사이네요.

1000663415.english: Whatever you do will be fun, but time is short—so enjoy the present, both of you.
1000663415.korean: 뭘 해도 즐겁겠지만, 시간은 짧으니 지금을 즐기도록 하세요, 두 분.

1000663416.english: - We left Circe's fortune-telling stall with her seeing us off.
1000663416.korean: - 키르케의 배웅을 받으며 키르케의 점집을 떠났다.

1000663417.english: Don't forget to spread the word, customer!

1000663418.english: Consider if maybe it's your laaaaaack of effort!
1000663418.korean: 손님의 노오오오오오오력이 부족한 건 아닌지 생각해보세요!

1000663419.english: - Resolving to surely get her a tent, I continued the date.
1000663419.korean: - 꼭 천막을 구해주자고 마음먹으며 데이트를 이어갔다.

1000663420.english: Are they gone? They're gone, right?

1000663423.english: Heheh! Liquor from the old era—where could you have gotten such a rare thing?
1000663423.korean: 후훗! 구시대의 술이라니… 이 귀한 걸 어디서 구하셨나 모르겠네요.

1000663426.english: You didn't have to give me something like this…

1000663427.english: If sweet words could bring joy, I'd say them as much as needed…
1000663427.korean: 입 발린 말로 기쁨을 줄 수 있다면 얼마든지 해드리는데...

1000663428.english: And even without fortune-telling, you can tell, right…
1000663428.korean: 그리고 점 같은 거 안 봐도 알 수 있잖아요...

1000663429.english: You don't have to go this far.

1000663430.english: Considering what kind of person he is…

1000663431.english: Of course, I won't refuse a gift though!
1000663431.korean: 물론 주는 거 거절도 안 하지만요!

1000663435.english: They say the pursuit of orientalism is outdated, but classics are classics for a reason.
1000663435.korean: 오리엔탈리즘의 추구가 구식이 되었다고는 하지만 클래식이 괜히 클래식은 아니죠.

1000663438.english: I, Audrey Dreamweaver, guarantee it. Very beautiful, pretty, utsukushi…
1000663438.korean: 바로 저 오드리 드림위버가 보증해요. 무척이나 아름답고, 뷰티플하고, 우츠쿠시하고...

1000663439.english: Fufu, but one word from someone else will surely touch the heart more than a hundred from me, right?
1000663439.korean: 후후, 하지만 저의 백 마디 말보다 다른 분의 한 마디 말이 더 하트를 터칭하겠죠?

1000663442.english: - At my compliment, Daika covered her blushing face.
1000663442.korean: - 내 칭찬에 다이카는 붉어진 얼굴을 가렸다.

1000663443.english: - But soon she peeked out again and smiled at me.
1000663443.korean: - 그러나 곧 다시 얼굴을 내밀며 나에게 웃어보였다.

1000663444.english: - When Audrey suddenly asked Daika to be her model while we were walking, I was puzzled…
1000663444.korean: - 길을 가다가 갑자기 오드리가 다이카에게 모델이 되어달라고 했을 때 의아해하기는 했지만...

1000663445.english: - But seeing Daika now, I thought it was a good thing she accepted.
1000663445.korean: - 지금 다이카의 모습을 보니 수락하길 잘했다는 생각이 들었다.

1000663446.english: - After taking the photos, we continued the date.
1000663446.korean: - 우리는 사진 촬영을 한 후에 데이트를 마저했다.

1000663448.english: I didn't like making a request that pricked my creator's pride…
1000663448.korean: 저의 크리에이터적 자부심을 건드리는 부탁을 해서 마음에 들지 않아서...

1000663449.english: I meant to evaluate honestly instead of according to the request…
1000663449.korean: 부탁과 달리 솔직하게 평가를 하려고 했지만...

1000663450.english: I admit it. She really was pretty.

1000663451.english: Letting emotions sway me into strange judgments is even harder for me to accept.
1000663451.korean: 이모셔널하게 되서 이상한 평가를 내리는 것이 저에겐 더 용납하기 힘든 일이니까요.

1000663455.english: Love. And do what you want.
1000663455.korean: 사랑하세요. 그리고 당신이 원하는 것을 하세요.

1000663457.english: Me too. But it's noon over there now, right?

1000663459.english: It's fine. I slept a lot during the day.

1000663461.english: Compared to before, I've been living more leisurely.

1000663463.english: We finally got to go on a date, and it turned out like this.

1000663465.english: Yeah. And we'll see each other again before long.
1000663465.korean: 응. 그리고 오래지 않아 다시 볼 수 있겠고.

1000663467.english: Ration, right? What's your favorite ration?

1000663468.english: Then shall we eat together? I've got Ration No. 72 here too.
1000663468.korean: 그러면 같이 먹을까? 여기도 72번 전투식량 있으니까.

1000663470.english: The faster construction finishes, the safer it'll be.

1000663471.english: Then should I sneak in a little to show you?

1000663472.english: If you're okay with it, Camel.

1000663473.english: You're not hurt or having any problems, right?

1000663478.english: Yeah. I'll definitely hug you. So come back safely.
1000663478.korean: 응. 꼭 안아줄게. 그러니 무사히 돌아와.

1000663479.english: You should've said I said no.
1000663479.korean: 내가 안 된다고 했다고 하지 그랬어.

1000663481.english: It's dark, but it's a secured area, so it's fine.
1000663481.korean: 어둡긴 해도 안전이 확보된 지역이라 괜찮아.

1000663482.english: It's a little chilly, but it's fine.

1000663483.english: Then… want to lace our fingers?

1000663484.english: Yeah. And right now I'm also lacing my fingers.
1000663484.korean: 응. 그리고 지금 나도 손깍지 끼고 있는 상황.

1000663485.english: Sorry. This is all I can do for now.
1000663485.korean: 미안해. 지금은 이런 것 밖에 못 해줘서.

1000663494.english: Face-to-face dates are good, but remote dates are nice too.
1000663494.korean: 대면 데이트도 좋지만, 원격 데이트도 좋네.

1000663495.english: Feels like we can spend time more leisurely.
1000663495.korean: 좀 더 느긋하게 보낼 수 있는 거 같아.

1000663496.english: If we'd gone into the bath together, we wouldn't have been able to relax because of other things, right?
1000663496.korean: 같이 욕탕에 들어왔으면 다른 일 때문에 느긋하게 지내지는 못했겠지?

1000663498.english: It's fine. I kept my time free just for dating Camel.
1000663498.korean: 괜찮아. 카멜과 데이트하는 시간은 온전히 비워뒀으니까.

1000663500.english: I feel the same way too.

1000663507.english: Of course it's fine! If Amy wants to go!

1000663509.english: Tomo really is one of the strong ones.

1000663511.english: Tch! I should've fought more aggressively in the early-mid phase!

1000663512.english: So you're playing a game together!

1000663515.english: Alright. I'll have this one. What about you, Amy?

1000663516.english: Yeah. I've tried it too, it was good.

1000663520.english: Amy, what's that place over there?

1000663522.english: No, it's just that you're too pretty.

1000663525.english: If it's Amy's wish… of course I'll grant it.

1000663528.english: Cyclops Princess… I've received your will and your eye!
1000663528.korean: 사이클롭스 프린세스... 너의 의지와 눈 잘 받았다!

1000663530.english: Oh? How can this little tool have so many functions?
1000663530.korean: 오? 이 작은 도구에 무슨 기능이 이렇게 많지?

1000663535.english: Aaah… when Amy seriously tempts me, I can't resist.
1000663535.korean: 아아... 에이미가 진심으로 유혹하니까 못 당하겠네.

1000663543.english: But how could the one who is Orca's commander ever allow such a thing to happen.
1000663543.korean: 하지만 오르카의 사령관 되는 자가 어찌 그런 일이 일어나게 두겠는가.

1000663544.english: For my dignity, I shall neither retreat! Nor fall into corruption!
1000663544.korean: 나의 위엄을 위해서라도 결코 물러서지도! 타락하지도 않을 것이다.

1000663546.english: Have you ever tried a punch machine?

1000663547.english: Here. Watch closely how I do it.
1000663547.korean: 자. 내가 하는 거 잘 봐.

1000663549.english: Frigga, do you want to try?

1000663553.english: Why is Frigga treated so differently from me!?
1000663553.korean: 어째 나랑 프리가랑 대우가 많이 다르다!?

1000663555.english: Hey. That's because I did well…
1000663555.korean: 야. 그건 내가 잘해서 그런 거잖아…

1000663556.english: It's just that I wanted to sing together with you…
1000663556.korean: 나랑 같이 노래 부르고 싶다고 해서 그런 건데…

1000663557.english: I didn't upload it. Other people saw and spread it.
1000663557.korean: 유포 안 시켰어. 다른 애들이 보고 퍼트린 거지.

1000663559.english: Have you decided what to eat?

1000663561.english: Steak. Just the meat, no side vegetables or sauce.
1000663561.korean: 스테이크. 곁들이는 채소나 소스 없이 고기만.

1000663566.english: Sowan? That order doesn't sound like mine.
1000663566.korean: 소완? 내 주문이랑 다른 거 같은데?

1000663567.english: Here, just hold my hand and get on, Frigga.
1000663567.korean: 자, 내 손 잡고 타면 돼, 프리가.

1000663571.english: …Come to think of it, I didn't dig that deep…

1000663573.english: I'm fine. Something like this is just a little mishap we can laugh off.
1000663573.korean: 괜찮아. 이 정도야 그냥 웃어넘길 수 있는 해프닝이지.

1000663574.english: What went wrong? It was a perfect plan.

1000663584.english: It's because I want to help.

1000663585.english: Frigga's been performing really well lately.

1000663586.english: Not as a reward, but is there something you want me to do?
1000663586.korean: 포상까지는 아니지만 내가 뭔가 해주길 바라는 게 있어?

1000663588.english: Hello, Daika. What were you doing?

1000663590.english: By the way, what's that luggage next to you?

1000663591.english: Then shall we have an early lunch?

1000663593.english: Wow! That must have taken a lot of effort, huh?

1000663594.english: No, I really mean it, not flattery.

1000663599.english: I didn't know Daika could cook this well.
1000663599.korean: 다이카가 이렇게 요리를 잘할 줄 몰랐어.

1000663602.english: It feels like everyone's pushing us together too much.
1000663602.korean: 사람들이 우리를 너무 밀어주는 거 같더라?

1000663603.english: Did Daika plan all of it?

1000663606.english: It means Daika is that sincere with me, right?

1000663607.english: If it had caused harm to someone, I'd be upset…
1000663607.korean: 누군가에게 피해를 입히는 짓을 했으면 슬펐겠지만…

1000663608.english: Yeah. I trust you. So I'm not upset at all.
1000663608.korean: 응. 믿어. 그러니까 전혀 안 불쾌해.

1000663609.english: But I don't understand why such an assertive Daika stayed quiet until now.
1000663609.korean: 그런데 이렇게 적극적인 다이카가 왜 지금까지 가만히 있었는지 모르겠어.

1000663615.english: Their body temperature is colder than mine…

1000663616.english: And their hands aren't that big.

1000663617.english: I think I'll be sure once I taste it.

1000663620.english: It's not the first time, is it?

1000663621.english: Is it okay if we're not outside?

1000663625.english: No, I was planning to eat it together.

1000663636.english: It's just that it feels like a cheesy couple.

1000663639.english: Shall we order one more drink?

1000663645.english: There's still so much I haven't worn…

1000663646.english: Where did all this come from?

1000663647.english: Last time I came, there were only women's clothes.

1000663656.english: Isn't it too much if you're alone?

1000663657.english: Since when did you like shopping this much?

1000663662.english: This is why shopping is fun, right?

1000663668.english: Isn't that the charm point of this outfit?
1000663668.korean: 그 점이 이 옷의 매력 포인트 아닐까?

1000663672.english: Shall we walk outside a bit?

1000663687.english: Is it okay if I stay out here?

1000663688.english: By the way, what clothes did Bulgasari pick?

1000663689.english: What kind of clothes could it be…

1000663694.english: I heard a scream and ran over.

1000663696.english: It's similar to the sweater I saw earlier.

1000663702.english: Bulgasari liked it later too, didn't you?

1000663703.english: I agree with what Bulgasari said.

1000663704.english: I didn't know decorating according to my taste could be this fun.
1000663704.korean: 취향대로 꾸민다는 게 이토록 즐거울 줄 몰랐어.

1000663707.english: Do you want to eat in my room?

1000663708.english: We can just eat and leave.

1000663711.english: Do you want to eat it?

1000663719.english: I'm already looking forward to it.

1000663722.english: You fed me this for that reason?

1000663728.english: Why? What did the fortune say?

1000663730.english: So… it means you two get along very well?

1000663734.english: Yeah! That's right! I came for a reading again!
1000663734.korean: 응! 맞아! 또 점 보러 왔어!

1000663735.english: As I said last time, I don't think it's that kind of issue…
1000663735.korean: 지난 번에도 말했지만 그런 문제가 아니라고 보는데…

1000663737.english: No, I said it's not about the rumors!

1000663740.english: I've reached the limit of beating around the bush. Why do you keep being so troublesome? ...I can't understand you, human. Why do you take an interest in me, why do you give me this? And why... fine, I'll accept the offer. Regret it if you like, I'm already your Nauthiz. Be careful not to make a mistake and turn me into ashes.
1000663740.korean: 돌려 말하는 것도 이젠 한계야. 왜 자꾸 성가시게 굴어? ...이해할 수 없네, 당신이란 인간.&n왜 나한테 관심을 갖는지, 왜 이런 걸 주는지. 그리고 내가 왜... 됐어, 그 제안 받아 들일게.&n후회해도 늦었어, 이미 난 당신의 Nauthiz니까. 실수해서 잿더미가 되지 않게 주의해.

1000663741.english: At first I tried to fulfill my duty as an officer... to be an excellent subordinate for Your Excellency... but at some point it wasn't as a soldier anymore; I genuinely wanted to be a strength for the Commander. When I first arrived I really took on a lot... I've changed a lot, haven't I? I've worked hard. I'll grow even more for you, Brother... so please keep watching over me!
1000663741.korean: 처음엔 장교로서 책임을 다하기 위해... 각하의 우수한 부하가 되기 위해서였는데... 언제부터 군인으로서가 아니라,&n그냥 진심으로 사령관님 힘이 되어 드리고 싶었어요. 갓 왔을 땐 얼 진짜 많이 탔는데... 저 진짜 많이 변했죠?&n노력 많이 했어요. 오빠를 위해서 지금보다 더 성장할 테니까... 앞으로도 절 지켜봐주세요!

1000663742.english: It's a confession event. The script... what? An ad-lib? Really? W-wait a moment, please! There are many things that give power to the unit. Pyramids, power stones, chickpeas... but the greatest power-giver is the Commander. Now! With the power of love we shall defeat the enemy and bring peace! This isn't acting, it's my true feeling.
1000663742.korean: 고백 이벤트로군요. 대본이… 네? 애드립? 네? 진짜? 자, 잠깐만 기다려주시와요!&n본 대원에게 힘을 주는 것은 많사와요. 피라미드, 파워스톤, 병아리콩…그러나 가장 큰 힘을 주는 것은 사령관이네요.&n자! 사랑의 힘으로 적을 무찌르고 평화를 가져오도록 하죠! 연기가 아니라 본녀의 본심이에요.

1000663745.english: Feels like it's been a while.

1000663746.english: We're both busy, so it can't be helped.
1000663746.korean: 피차 바쁘다 보니 어쩔 수 없지만 말이오.

1000663748.english: Thanks to the captain's concern, I've been doing well.
1000663748.korean: 대장님께서 걱정해주시는 덕분에 잘 지내고 있어요.

1000663749.english: I heard you're recently handling a new mission called Cafe Horizon.
1000663749.korean: 최근에 카페 호라이즌이라는 새로운 과업을 하고 있다고 들었소.

1000663751.english: It's busier than expected, but everyone is enjoying themselves.
1000663751.korean: 생각 이상으로 성황이라 바쁘게 지내고 있지만 모두가 즐겁게 지내고 있어요.

1000663752.english: Ah! Of course, we haven't forgotten our main mission!
1000663752.korean: 아! 물론 저희들의 본 임무가 뭔지 잊지는 않고 있어요!

1000663753.english: I know. Your diligence and ability are sufficient.
1000663753.korean: 알고 있소. 귀관의 성실성과 능력이 충분하다는 것을.

1000663754.english: During the absence of headquarters, you led the fleet better than anyone, and if headquarters didn't notice, it would mean headquarters lacked ability.
1000663754.korean: 본관이 없는 동안에 그 누구보다도 훌륭하게 함대를 이끌었는데 이를 본관이 모른다면 본관의 능력이 부족한 것 아니겠소.

1000663755.english: Ah, no. I was just lucky… it was possible because everyone was there.
1000663755.korean: 아, 아니에요. 어디까지나 운이 좋았고... 모두가 있었기에 가능한 거였어요.

1000663756.korean: 겸양이 언제나 미덕이 되는 것은 아니오.

1000663757.english: Luck is meaningless to the unprepared, and just having numbers doesn't achieve anything.
1000663757.korean: 준비되지 않은 자에게 운은 무의미한 것이고, 단순히 머릿수가 많다고 무언가를 이룩할 수는 없지 않소.

1000663758.english: That luck and everyone's cooperation were thanks to your reputation and ability.
1000663758.korean: 운이 따라준 것도, 모두가 힘을 합친 것도 귀관의 인망과 능력이 있었던 덕분이오.

1000663759.english: An officer is at risk both overestimating and underestimating their own abilities.
1000663759.korean: 장교는 자신의 능력을 과대평가하는 것도 위험하지만 자신의 능력을 과소평가하는 것도 위험한 법이오.

1000663760.english: I will… keep that in mind.

1000663761.english: I ended up giving a lecture without realizing it.

1000663763.english: I became interested in the cafe that you and other crew members are running…
1000663763.korean: 귀관과 다른 부대원들이 하고 있다는 카페에 흥미가 생겨서 그런데...

1000663765.english: Of course! If it's the captain, you're always welcome!

1000663766.english: Not just me, but all the other members will be glad too.
1000663766.korean: 저뿐만이 아니라 다른 대원들도 모두 반길 거예요.

1000663767.english: Haha, hearing that already makes me excited.
1000663767.korean: 후후, 그 말을 들으니 벌써부터 기대되는구려.

1000663768.english: Can I visit around this time tomorrow?

1000663769.english: Yes! We'll be fully prepared and waiting.
1000663769.korean: 네! 만반의 준비를 하고 기다리고 있겠어요.

1000663770.english: Understood. Then I'll see you tomorrow.

1000663771.english: Headquarters has work to attend to for now.

1000663773.english: The captain… will come to Cafe Horizon…

1000663774.english: Great! Let's prepare the best beans and ingredients!
1000663774.korean: 좋아! 가장 좋은 원두랑 재료를 준비하자!

1000663775.english: …No. A fair and just captain wouldn't want special treatment over other guests.
1000663775.korean: ...아니야. 공명정대하신 대장님이라면 다른 손님보다 특별 대우하는 것을 바라시지는 않으실 거야.

1000663776.english: And until now, we've never treated guests without sincerity!
1000663776.korean: 그리고 지금까지 성의 없이 손님을 상대한 적은 한 번도 없어!

1000663777.english: Still… should we do the regular big cleaning in advance? And… also…
1000663777.korean: 그래도... 정기적으로 하던 대청소를 미리 할까? 그리고... 또...

1000663782.english: Did you get caught singing an embarrassing song alone again?
1000663782.korean: 또 혼자 부끄러운 노래 부르다가 다른 사람한테 들켰어?

1000663784.english: That cheese. I didn't eat it alone, right? Undine ate some too!
1000663784.korean: 그 치즈. 저만 먹은 거 아니에요? 운디네도 같이 먹었어요!

1000663785.english: Thetis! We agreed to keep it a secret from each other!

1000663786.english: No wonder the cheese stock has been… no. Cheese isn't the problem now.
1000663786.korean: 어쩐지 최근에 치즈 재고가... 아뇨. 지금은 치즈가 문제가 아니에요.

1000663787.english: Our captain. The Invincible Dragon said they'll visit Cafe Horizon tomorrow!
1000663787.korean: 우리 대장님. 무적의 용 님께서 내일 카페 호라이즌을 방문하겠다고 하셨단 말이에요!

1000663788.english: The captain is coming to Cafe Horizon? Exciting!

1000663789.english: Can Neri go out to greet the captain?
1000663789.korean: 저기 네리가 대장님 마중 나가도 돼?

1000663790.english: Did they mention the menu? I'll prepare it in advance!

1000663791.english: Should we showcase the new menu we developed… or rather, present our most confident menu instead of experimenting…
1000663791.korean: 이번에 개발한 신 메뉴를... 아니, 모험을 하기보다는 가장 자신 있는 메뉴를 선보이는 게 나으려나...

1000663792.english: But what's the big problem? What is it?

1000663793.english: It's not that we're missing ingredients or that there's an issue with the shop…
1000663793.korean: 재료가 없는 것도 아니고, 가게에 문제가 생긴 것도 아닌데...

1000663797.english: Although the outfit is for the commander… showing it to the captain…
1000663797.korean: 사령관님을 위해서 입은 복장이긴 하지만... 대장님께 보여드리기에는...

1000663798.english: The captain might not even scold us…

1000663799.english: Kya ha ha, what's with Orca acting surprised.

1000663800.english: ……Still, wearing that outfit in front of the captain…

1000663801.english: It feels too influenced by Orca.

1000663802.english: We can think about that later.

1000663803.english: For now, let's focus on the uniforms.

1000663805.english: Ah! Neri has a good idea!

1000663806.english: What if we fill the cafe with guests until it's full?
1000663806.korean: 손님을 잔뜩 끌어모아서 만석으로 만드는 건 어때?

1000663807.english: Then they'll have to line up to get in.
1000663807.korean: 그러면 줄을 서서 들어오실 수 있잖아.

1000663808.english: How about closing the shop just for tomorrow?
1000663808.korean: 그냥 내일 하루만 가게를 닫는 건 어떨까?

1000663810.english: And… we want to show the captain that we're working hard.
1000663810.korean: 그리고... 대장님께 저희들이 열심히 일하는 모습을 보여드리고 싶어요.

1000663811.english: Should we somehow… justify the legitimacy of Cafe Horizon's uniforms…
1000663811.korean: 어떻게든... 카페 호라이즌의 유니폼의 정당성을 찾는 것이 나을까요...

1000663814.english: Is there a reason we must wear maid outfits?

1000663815.english: Can't we just wear the regular Horizon uniforms for serving?
1000663815.korean: 그냥 원래 입는 호라이즌 유니폼 입고 접객하면 안 돼요?

1000663817.english: I see… I think I overcomplicated things.
1000663817.korean: 그렇...네요. 너무 어렵게 생각한 거 같네요.

1000663818.english: Alright, tomorrow we'll serve wearing Horizon uniforms.
1000663818.korean: 좋아요, 내일은 호라이즌 유니폼을 입고 접객하기로 해요.

1000663824.english: The two of you will clean the cafe after it closes today.
1000663824.korean: 두 사람은 오늘 카페가 끝나면 카페 청소를 하도록 하세요.

1000663828.english: I already suggested a solution for the uniform problem!

1000663829.english: The problem is that you ate it secretly… and the principle of reward and punishment exists for a reason…
1000663829.korean: 몰래 먹은 게 문제라고요… 그리고 신상필벌의 원칙이 괜히 있는 게 아니잖아요…

1000663830.english: Um, Vice Commander. Then can Neri eat the cheese too?
1000663830.korean: 저기, 부함장님. 그러면 네리도 치즈 먹어도 돼?

1000663831.english: Neri will eat cheese and clean together.

1000663835.english: Cleaning together as four will be faster and neater, right?
1000663835.korean: 넷이서 하면 더 빠르고 깔끔하게 청소할 수 있겠죠?

1000663836.english: - While wandering the base, we encountered the dragon.

1000663838.english: There's no time to land; there's so much to handle in my jurisdiction.
1000663838.korean: 상륙할 시간도 없을 정도로 소관이 처리해야 할 일이 산적해 있어서 말이오.

1000663839.english: Haha, saying this in front of the master who does more than anyone else… forgive me.
1000663839.korean: 후후, 그 누구보다도 가장 많은 일을 하는 주군 앞에서 이런 말을 하다니... 잊어주시오.

1000663840.english: Because the master fulfilled duties, such a wonderful base could be established.
1000663840.korean: 주군께서 의무를 행하였기에 이렇게 멋진 거점을 마련할 수 있게 된 것 아니겠소.

1000663841.english: - To avoid continuous praise from the dragon, I subtly changed the topic.
1000663841.korean: - 이대로라면 계속 용의 찬사를 들을 거 같아 살짝 화제를 돌렸다.

1000663842.english: Exactly. Resting is also a duty for soldiers.

1000663843.english: - Not only the dragon but I've heard the same from other crew members…
1000663843.korean: - 용뿐만 아니라 다른 대원들에게도 많이 들은 말이다…

1000663844.english: Since the subordinates set up a cafe, I thought to visit it.
1000663844.korean: 부하들이 카페를 차렸다고 해서 그곳을 방문해보려고 하오.

1000663845.english: Of course. No, if you do, I'd be very happy.
1000663845.korean: 물론이오. 아니, 그래주신다면 소관은 무척이나 기쁘오.

1000663846.english: - The dragon smiled without a trace of falsehood.
1000663846.korean: - 용은 일말의 거짓도 없는 미소를 지었다.

1000663849.english: - Hearing the dragon's laughter, we headed toward Cafe Horizon.
1000663849.korean: - 용의 웃음소리를 들으며 카페 호라이즌으로 향했다.

1000663851.english: Welcome, master… ah, no! Commander! Captain!
1000663851.korean: 어서 오세요, 주인... 아, 아니! 사령관! 대장님!

1000663852.english: - Arriving at Cafe Horizon, Nereid greeted us.

1000663853.english: - Seeing that Nereid wasn't surprised, there must have been a prior arrangement.
1000663853.korean: - 네레이드가 놀라지 않은 것을 보면 미리 약속이 되어있었나 보다.

1000663854.english: - But something feels… out of place…

1000663855.english: Sit here! The best seat by the window!
1000663855.korean: 여기에 앉으면 돼! 창가의 제일 좋은 자리야!

1000663857.english: - After showing the seat, Nereid sent me an unreadable signal and went to serve the others.
1000663857.korean: - 자리를 안내하고 네레이드는 나에게 알 수 없는 신호를 보내고 다른 사람들을 접객하러 갔다.

1000663858.english: Welcome, Commander, Captain. Here's the menu.
1000663858.korean: 어서 오세요, 사령관님, 대장님. 메뉴판 여기 있어요.

1000663859.english: The menu is substantial. Although headquarters has little experience with cafes of the old era, you can tell it's a good place.
1000663859.korean: 메뉴가 충실하군. 본관이 옛시대의 카페에 대한 경험은 적으나 좋은 가게라는 것을 능히 알 수 있겠소.

1000663860.english: Above all, seeing all the cafe guests with happy expressions is enough.
1000663860.korean: 무엇보다도 카페 손님들이 모두 즐거운 표정을 짓는 것으로도.

1000663861.english: Since we're carrying the Horizon name, we must do so without embarrassment.
1000663861.korean: 호라이즌이라는 이름을 내걸었으니 부끄럽지 않게 해야겠죠.

1000663862.english: Then headquarters will order the Original Blend and the Original Cheesecake.
1000663862.korean: 그러면 본관은 오리지널 블렌드와 오리지널 치즈 케이크를 주문하겠소.

1000663863.english: One Original Blend and one Original Cheesecake, correct?
1000663863.korean: 오리지널 블렌드 하나 오리지널 치즈 케이크 맞으시죠?

1000663866.english: Kya ha ha! You can't say that when you keep changing your order every time.
1000663866.korean: 꺄하핫! 맨날 주문이 바뀌시면서 그런 말을 하시면 안 되죠.

1000663868.english: Two Original Blends and two Original Cheesecakes~
1000663868.korean: 오리지널 블렌드 둘 오리지널 치즈 케이크 둘~

1000663869.english: - Thetis said this and headed to the kitchen.

1000663870.english: - But before leaving, I felt a subtle unease from Thetis, and at the same time saw her give a small signal.
1000663870.korean: - 하지만 떠나기 전 나는 테티스에게 어떤 위화감을 느꼈고, 동시에 테티스가 작게 신호를 보내는 것도 보았다.

1000663871.english: You've arrived, Captain! And welcome, Commander.
1000663871.korean: 오셨군요, 대장님! 그리고 어서 오세요, 사령관님.

1000663872.english: Didn't we make a promise yesterday?

1000663873.english: Haha, everyone is full of energy because the captain came.
1000663873.korean: 후후, 대장님께서 오셔서 모두가 의욕이 넘치고 있어요.

1000663874.english: Just like on the battlefield when the captain personally commands.
1000663874.korean: 대장님께서 직접 지휘하시는 전장에 있을 때처럼요.

1000663875.english: - Siren conversed warmly with the dragon.

1000663876.english: - The conversation was that of a respectful superior and loyal subordinate, but the atmosphere was closer to an admired older sister and a cute younger sibling.
1000663876.korean: - 말의 내용은 존경스러운 상관과 충실한 부하의 대화였지만, 그 분위기는 동경하는 언니와 귀여운 동생에 더 가까웠다.

1000663877.english: - I felt pleased watching that, but also a little awkward.
1000663877.korean: - 그 모습에 흐뭇해하면서 나는 동시에 어색함도 느꼈다.

1000663878.english: You have no idea how many trials we went through to make the best cheesecake.
1000663878.korean: 최고의 치즈 케이크를 만들기 위해서 얼마나 많은 시행착오를 겪었는지 몰라요.

1000663879.english: - While happily talking with the dragon, Siren was secretly sending me signals without the dragon noticing.
1000663879.korean: - 용과 즐겁게 이야기를 하는 와중에 세이렌은 용이 알아차리지 못하게 나에게 신호를 보내고 있었다.

1000663880.english: - What could this signal mean… this strange feeling…
1000663880.korean: - 이 신호가 뭘까... 이 기묘한 느낌도...

1000663881.english: Your ordered Original Blend and Original Cheesecake are here.
1000663881.korean: 주문하신 오리지널 블렌드와 오리지널 치즈 케이크 나왔습니다.

1000663883.english: - I also sensed unfamiliarity from Undine.

1000663884.english: - The source of that discomfort was discovered when eating the cheesecake.
1000663884.korean: - 그 이질감의 정체는 치즈 케이크를 먹을 때 발견했다.

1000663885.english: - Written in thin letters on the cheesecake was the word ‘uniform'.
1000663885.korean: - 치즈 케이크 위에는 가느다란 글씨체로 '복장'이라고 써져있었다.

1000663887.english: - Today, the Horizon members inside the cafe were not wearing the Cafe Horizon maid outfits, but the Horizon sailor uniforms.
1000663887.korean: - 호라이즌 대원들이 오늘은 카페 안에서도 카페 호라이즌의 메이드복이 아닌, 호라이즌의 세일러복을 입고 있었다.

1000663888.english: - Since both are Horizon uniforms, I noticed it late.
1000663888.korean: - 둘 다 호라이즌 대원들의 유니폼이기에 알아차리는 게 늦었다.

1000663889.english: - This is probably why the Horizon members were trying to signal me somehow.
1000663889.korean: - 호라이즌 대원들이 어떻게든 나에게 신호를 보내는 것도 이 때문이겠지.

1000663890.english: - I wondered why, but the answer was already clear.
1000663890.korean: - 왜 그런가 하고 생각해 봤지만 답은 이미 나와있었다.

1000663892.english: - Because of the dragon sitting across from me, eating coffee and cheesecake.
1000663892.korean: - 나의 맞은편에 앉아서 커피와 치즈 케이크를 먹는 용 때문이겠지.

1000663893.english: - The Invincible Dragon. Horizon… no. In the old era, she was the commander of Black River, and in the War of Annihilation, she commanded three fleets.
1000663893.korean: - 무적의 용. 호라이즌... 아니. 옛 시대에선 블랙리버의 총지휘관이었었고, 멸망전쟁에서는 세 함대의 지휘관이었던 존재.

1000663894.english: - The Horizon members probably didn't want to show the cafe uniforms to the dragon.
1000663894.korean: - 호라이즌 대원들은 용에게 카페의 유니폼을 보여주고 싶지 않았던 것이겠지.

1000663895.english: - I don't know the exact reason, lacking old-era common sense, but there must be a reason for their behavior.
1000663895.korean: - 옛 시대의 상식이 부족한 나이기에 명확한 이유는 모르겠지만 그녀들이 그런 태도를 보이는 데에는 이유가 있겠지.

1000663896.english: - I decided to go along with it.

1000663898.english: I've tried many gourmet foods, but none as delicious as here.
1000663898.korean: 여러 기호식품을 접해보았소만 여기만큼 맛있지는 않았소.

1000663899.english: If Captain Mari, who's particular about coffee, acknowledges it, isn't that like a guarantee?
1000663899.korean: 커피에 까다로운 마리 대장이 인정했다면 보증 수표나 마찬가지 아니겠소?

1000663900.english: - Drinking coffee and eating cake, it was hard to find the undefeated commander in the dragon, but the sight didn't feel awkward.
1000663900.korean: - 커피를 마시고, 케이크를 먹으며 잡담을 하는 용에게선 무패의 지휘관의 면모를 찾기 힘들었지만 그 모습도 어색하지 않았다.

1000663901.english: - After finishing the first cup, the dragon refilled her coffee and silently looked around Cafe Horizon.
1000663901.korean: - 첫 번째 잔을 비운 용은 커피를 리필 받은 후에 말없이 카페 호라이즌을 둘러보았다.

1000663902.english: - Her gaze sometimes focused on the overall cafe, sometimes on the guests.
1000663902.korean: - 그녀의 시선은 카페의 전경일 때도 있었고. 카페의 손님일 때도 있었다.

1000663903.english: - But most often and longest, her gaze fell on…
1000663903.korean: - 하지만 그녀의 시선이 가장 많이, 오랫동안 향하는 곳은...

1000663905.english: Just a moment! Let me arrange the seats first!
1000663905.korean: 몇 분... 잠시만! 자리 정리부터 할게!

1000663907.english: One Americano and two Cafe Mochas, got it.
1000663907.korean: 아메리카노 한 잔, 카페 모카 두 잔 주문 받았습니다.

1000663908.english: Vice Commander! Help in the kitchen!

1000663909.english: There are too many dessert orders!

1000663911.english: Your Earl Grey and chocolate chip cookies are ready!

1000663912.english: - The place the dragon looked at most often and for the longest was where the Horizon members were.
1000663912.korean: - 용의 시선이 가장 많이, 오랫동안 향하는 곳은 호라이즌 대원들이 있는 곳이었다.

1000663914.english: - The dragon said nothing. Yet on her face was a different smile than when chatting with me.
1000663914.korean: - 용은 아무런 말이 없었다. 그러나 그런 그녀에게는 나와 잡담을 나눌 때와는 다른 미소가 머무르고 있었다.

1000663915.english: - Seeing her so happy, I silently followed her gaze.
1000663915.korean: - 그런 그녀가 무척이나 기뻐보였기에 나도 말없이 그녀의 시선을 따라갔다.

1000663917.korean: - 리필 받은 커피까지 다 마신 후.

1000663918.english: It would be rude to take up the seat any longer.
1000663918.korean: 이 이상 자리를 차지하는 것도 폐가 되겠지.

1000663920.english: - While talking with the dragon… someone clung to my right arm.
1000663920.korean: - 용과 대화를 나누던 중... 누군가가 내 오른팔에 매달렸다.

1000663921.english: You're here, master? CheonA missed you so much.
1000663921.korean: 오셨나요, 주인님? 천아는 주인님 엄청 보고 싶었어요.

1000663922.english: - Looking at CheonA, I noticed Boots standing behind her.
1000663922.korean: - 천아를 바라보자 그 뒤에 있는 장화도 보였다.

1000663925.english: Master, that naughty cat is staring at CheonA.
1000663925.korean: 주인님. 저 나쁜 고양이가 천아를 노려봐요.

1000663930.english: Huh? Manager. Why are you wearing those clothes?
1000663930.korean: 응? 점장님. 왜 그런 옷을 입고 있어요?

1000663932.english: I told you to wear this kind of outfit when you first worked here.
1000663932.korean: 내가 처음에 여기에서 일할 때 이런 옷 입으라고 했잖아.

1000663935.english: Manager, you didn't notify us at all…
1000663935.korean: 점장님, 우리한테는 아무런 통보도 안 해주시고...

1000663937.english: Did you… say you liked that look?

1000663939.english: Manager, do you have spare clothes? If the master wants, we should of course wear them.
1000663939.korean: 점장님 남는 옷 없어요? 주인님께서 원하시면 당연히 입어야죠.

1000663940.english: Then what title should we use? Captain? Commander? Captain? Admiral?
1000663940.korean: 그러면 호칭은 무엇으로 해야하려나? 선장님? 함장님? 캡틴? 제독?

1000663943.english: - Somehow, it felt like the outfit was changed because I wanted it…
1000663943.korean: - 어째 내가 원해서 복장이 바뀌었다는 분위기가 만들어지는데…

1000663945.english: - Siren tried to figure out how to handle the situation, but being unable to lie, she couldn't give a proper answer.
1000663945.korean: - 세이렌은 어떻게든 지금 상황을 타개하려고 머리를 굴렸지만 거짓말을 못하는 그녀는 제대로 답을 내지 못했다.

1000663946.english: - And the dragon who saw Cafe Horizon's original uniform…
1000663946.korean: - 그리고 카페 호라이즌의 원래 유니폼을 본 용은...

1000663949.english: I'm glad you're all having a good time.
1000663949.korean: 즐겁게 잘 지내고 있는 거 같아서 다행이오.

1000663950.english: Don't worry too much; I already know how you usually behave.
1000663950.korean: 귀관들의 평소 모습은 이미 알고 있으니 너무 괘념치는 마시오.

1000663952.english: - The dragon stood up from her seat.

1000663953.english: Thanks to you, I had a good time.
1000663953.korean: 덕분에 좋은 시간을 보낼 수 있었소.

1000663954.english: Next time, show your true selves without hiding anything.
1000663954.korean: 다음에는 숨기는 것 없이 그대로의 모습을 보여주시오.

1000663956.english: - The dragon left Cafe Horizon, and after calming Boots and CheonA, I followed behind her out of the cafe.
1000663956.korean: - 용이 카페 호라이즌을 떠났고, 나도 장화와 천아를 달랜 후에 그 뒤를 따라 카페 호라이즌을 떠났다.

1000663958.english: - At first, I thought she might be angry for saying nothing, but her aura gave off no negativity at all.
1000663958.korean: - 용이 아무런 말도 하지 않아 화가 났나 싶었지만 그녀에게서 풍겨오는 분위기에서는 부정적인 것이 전혀 느껴지지 않았다.

1000663959.english: - Finally, when we reached the sea, the dragon stopped walking.
1000663959.korean: - 이윽고 바다에 도달하자 용은 그 발걸음을 멈췄다.

1000663960.english: - The dragon gazed at the sea for a moment before speaking.
1000663960.korean: - 용은 잠시 바다를 바라보다가 입을 열었다.

1000663961.english: Seeing the subordinates enjoying themselves brings me great joy.
1000663961.korean: 부하들이 즐겁게 지내는 모습을 보니 무척이나 기쁘오.

1000663964.english: I am very glad to serve you.
1000663964.korean: 소관은 주군을 모실 수 있어서 무척이나 기쁘오.

1000663965.english: You, as a warrior, possess all the virtues of wisdom, virtue, and luck, and as a ruler, you show the qualities of a sage king.
1000663965.korean: 주군은 무장으로서는 지덕운을 모두 갖추었고, 군주로서는 성군 같은 덕치를 할 자질을 보여주었소.

1000663966.english: - Embarrassed, I spoke, and the dragon responded with a smile yet a serious face.
1000663966.korean: - 겸연쩍어서 한 말에 용은 웃음기가 있지만 진지한 얼굴로 말했다.

1000663967.english: It is neither flattery, nor praise, nor falsehood.

1000663968.english: I will neither flatter nor lie to you, master. Headquarters does not know how to do such things. Nor should it.
1000663968.korean: 소관은 주군에게 아첨하지도, 거짓말하지도 않을 것이오. 본관은 그런 것을 할 줄 모르오. 그래서도 안 되고.

1000663969.english: As one granted autonomy capable of defying humans, this is my evaluation and conclusion of you.
1000663969.korean: 인간에게 항명할 수 있는 자율권을 보장받은 자로서 주군을 평가하고 내린 결론이오.

1000663970.english: Though it may be improper for me to judge you…
1000663970.korean: 소관이 주군을 평가하는 것이 그릇된 일이기는 하오만...

1000663973.english: I am burdened with a title beyond what I deserve.

1000663976.english: Even if one wins ninety-nine out of a hundred battles, a single defeat invalidates the title.
1000663976.korean: 백 번을 싸워 아흔아홉 번을 이겨도 한 번 패배해버리면 부정될 칭호.

1000663977.english: But so far, luck has favored me… and with excellent subordinates who follow me, the lineage continues by a thread.
1000663977.korean: 하지만 아직까지는 운이 좋아서… 소관을 따라주는 훌륭한 부하들이 있어 간신히 명맥은 유지하고 있소.

1000663978.english: Haha. I ended up saying something like when Vice Commander Siren is overly modest.
1000663978.korean: 후후. 세이렌 부함장이 지나치게 겸양할 때와 같은 소리를 해버렸군.

1000663983.english: All I know is to fight and lead war to victory.
1000663983.korean: 소관이 할 줄 아는 것은 싸우고, 전쟁을 승리로 이끄는 것 뿐이오.

1000663984.english: Therefore, I can give those who follow me nothing but victory and defeat, survival and death.
1000663984.korean: 그러하기에 소관은 소관을 따르는 이들에게 승리와 패배, 생존과 전사 외에는 아무것도 주지 못하오.

1000663985.english: This is all the invincible can offer.
1000663985.korean: 무적이 할 줄 아는 것은 이런 것뿐이오.

1000663986.english: - As I tried to respond, the dragon spoke first.
1000663986.korean: - 내가 무언가 반박하려고 할 때 용이 먼저 입을 열었다.

1000663987.english: My subordinates and I may look human, but we are born as tools for war.
1000663987.korean: 소관과 부하들은 인간처럼 생겼지만 태생이 전쟁을 위한 도구요.

1000663988.english: Born for war, living on the battlefield, dying in battle—it is natural.
1000663988.korean: 전쟁을 위해 태어나고, 전장에서 살아가며, 전사하는 것이 당연한 존재.

1000663989.english: But… recently, my thoughts have changed.

1000663991.english: Plan things meaningless to war machines, act in ways unfit for war machines…
1000663991.korean: 전쟁병기에게는 의미가 없는 계획을 세우고, 전쟁병기에게는 어울리지 않는 행동을 하고…

1000663993.english: I have seen such daydream-like behavior.

1000663994.english: What I cannot give to my subordinates, you can give.
1000663994.korean: 소관이 부하들에게 줄 수 없는 것을 주군은 줄 수 있소.

1000663995.english: And you have given me something new as well.
1000663995.korean: 그리고 주군은 소관에게도 새로운 것을 주었소.

1000663997.english: Could we see a world without war?
1000663997.korean: 전쟁이 없어진 세계를 볼 수 있지 않을까?

1000663998.english: What would the world be like after all wars end?
1000663998.korean: 모든 전쟁이 끝난 이후의 세계는 어떻게 될까?

1000663999.english: And in that world, what would we become?
1000663999.korean: 그리고 그 세계에서 우리들은 어떻게 될까?

1000664001.english: - The dragon smiled and looked beyond the sea.

1000664002.english: Embarrassingly, I have never considered the end of war until now.
1000664002.korean: 부끄럽지만 소관은 지금까지 전쟁의 끝을 생각해본 적이 없소.

1000664004.english: - Yet her gaze went far beyond that.
1000664004.korean: - 그러나 그녀의 시선은 그보다 훨씬 먼 곳을 바라보고 있었다.

1000664005.english: Having experienced little beyond war, it is hard to even imagine.
1000664005.korean: 소관은 전쟁 외의 것은 경험이 일천하여 감히 상상하기도 어렵소.

1000664006.english: - The dragon turned her head to look at me.

1000664007.english: But I am confident that with you, I will see it.
1000664007.korean: 그러나 주군이 있다면 볼 수 있을 거라 확신하오.

1000664008.english: - The dragon extended her sword toward me.

1000664009.english: - A sword that can be called a symbol of the dragon.
1000664009.korean: - 용의 상징이라고 할 수 있는 검.

1000664010.english: - From here on is a path unknown to me.

1000664011.english: No, it is a path no one can know.
1000664011.korean: 아니, 그 누구도 알 수 없는 길이오.

1000664012.english: Yet I hope you move forward without hesitation.

1000664013.english: All of Orca will follow you without a shred of doubt.
1000664013.korean: 오르카의 모두가 한치의 의심도 없이 주군을 따를 것이니.

1000664017.english: If anyone blocks your path, I will cut them down; if you stumble, I will support you.
1000664017.korean: 주군의 앞길을 막는 이가 있으면 소관이 베어버릴 것이고, 주군이 비틀거릴 때 지탱해 드리리다.

1000664018.english: No matter what path you take, it will be the right one for me.
1000664018.korean: 주군이 나아가는 길은 그 어떠한 길이든 소관에게는 옳은 길일지니.

1000664019.english: There is only one thing I desire.

1000664020.english: Master. Show me… no, show us… the future.
1000664020.korean: 주군. 소관에게. 아니, 우리에게 미래를 보여주시오.

1000664022.english: - The dragon's sword was heavy, but the heart contained within it was even heavier.
1000664022.korean: - 용의 검은 무거웠으나 그 안에 담긴 용의 마음은 더욱 무거웠다.

1000664023.english: - The dragon's voice was deep, but the wish within it was even deeper.
1000664023.korean: - 용의 목소리는 깊었으나 그 안에 담긴 바람은 더욱 깊었다.

1000664024.english: - Her gaze was steadfast, yet her will within it was even more unwavering.
1000664024.korean: - 용의 시선은 올곧았으나 그 안에 담긴 그녀의 의지는 더욱 올곧았다.

1000664025.english: - A being born for war, living only for war, now dreams of a world without it and vowed to stay by my side.
1000664025.korean: - 전쟁을 위해 태어났고, 전쟁만을 위해 살아온 존재가 전쟁이 없는 세상을 꿈꾸며 내 곁을 지키겠다고 했다.

1000664026.english: - This heart is not hers alone, but the heart of all.
1000664026.korean: - 이는 용 한 사람만의 마음이 아니라 모두의 마음일 것이다.

1000664027.english: - After facing such a vast, heavy, deep, and steadfast heart…
1000664027.korean: - 너무나도 크고. 무겁고. 깊고. 올곧은 마음을 직시한 후…

1000664030.english: - After returning the sword to the dragon, we silently looked at each other for a moment.
1000664030.korean: - 용에게 받은 검을 용에게 다시 돌려준 후 우리는 잠시 말없이 서로를 바라보았다.

1000664033.english: - Something serious just happened, but with no set procedure, it feels awkward.
1000664033.korean: - 뭔가 진지한 분위기에 뭔가를 한 거 같은데… 정해진 절차가 없으니 뭔가 어색해지려고 한다.

1000664035.english: A little… embarrassing words, a little… embarrassing act, I think we did.
1000664035.korean: 조금… 낯부끄러운 소리, 낯부끄러운 짓을 한 것 같소.

1000664037.english: All of it comes from my true heart.

1000664038.english: - After a brief conversation, as the awkwardness returned, I asked.
1000664038.korean: - 짧은 대화 후 다시 어색해지려고 할 때, 나는 물었다.

1000664040.english: I have no clear thoughts yet…

1000664043.english: It is too much for me… saying it shamelessly makes me hesitate.
1000664043.korean: 소관에게는 과분한 것이라… 염치없이 말하려니 주저하게 되오.

1000664045.english: if you say so… I cannot refuse.

1000664051.english: Even after all wars have ended…

1000664052.english: Without war, this body would have no use…

1000664053.english: Yet… I dare to want to be by your side.
1000664053.korean: 그래도… 감히 주군의 곁에 있고 싶소.

1000664056.english: - The dragon cautiously embraced me in return.

1000664057.english: - Born for war, living only for war, and bearing the title of invincible…
1000664057.korean: - 전쟁을 위해 태어났고, 전쟁만을 위해 살아왔으며, 무적이라는 칭호까지 받았지만…

1000664058.english: - Yet dreaming more than anyone of a world without war, and wishing to stay by my side in such a world…
1000664058.korean: - 그 누구보다도 전쟁이 없는 세상을 꿈꾸고, 그런 세상에서 내 곁에 머무르기를 원하는 그녀에게…

1000664059.english: - I vowed to show her a world beyond even what she hopes for.
1000664059.korean: - 그녀가 바라는 것 이상의 세계를 보여주기로 다짐했다.

1000664060.english: - We sat side by side on the beach, looking at the horizon and talking about the world we would see.
1000664060.korean: - 우리는 해변에 나란히 앉아 수평선을 바라보며 우리가 보게 될 세상을 이야기했다.

1000664061.english: - The world we dreamed of felt, for now, like a fantasy, like a child's drawing.
1000664061.korean: - 우리가 꿈꾸는 세상은 지금 당장은 어린아이의 그림처럼 환상으로 느껴졌다.

1000664062.english: - Just as a child painting is happy, we were happy dreaming our dreams.
1000664062.korean: - 그림을 그리는 어린아이가 행복한 것처럼 꿈을 그리는 우리는 행복했다.

1000664063.english: - Yet we never doubted that the world we dreamed of would come true.
1000664063.korean: - 그러나 우리는 우리가 꿈꾸는 세상이 오리란 걸 결코 의심하지 않았다.

1000664064.english: - We talked all night about the world we would see…
1000664064.korean: - 우리는 밤새 우리가 보게 될 세상에 대해서 이야기했고…

1000664065.english: - As the sun rose beyond the horizon, we fell asleep leaning on each other's shoulders.
1000664065.korean: - 수평선 너머로 해가 떠오르자 그대로 서로의 어깨에 기대어 잠이 들었다.

1000664066.english: - Dreaming of the world beyond the horizon…

1000664067.english: Dragon. It's been a while, hasn't it?

1000664068.english: I'm just doing what I need to do, that's all.
1000664068.korean: 내가 해야 할 일을 하는 것뿐인데, 뭘.

1000664070.english: What are you planning to do now?

1000664071.english: Really? Then can I accompany you too?

1000664072.english: I'll have what I always have.

1000664073.english: Then the same as the dragon.

1000664076.english: Right? And you never stop here, always researching.
1000664076.korean: 그렇지? 더군다나 여기서 멈추지 않고 언제나 연구하더라.

1000664077.english: Now that I think about it, Mari seems to like this coffee too.
1000664077.korean: 그러고 보니 마리도 여기 커피를 좋아하는 거 같더라.

1000664083.english: No. It's fine. Keep talking. I'll listen.

1000664086.english: I will show the dragon and everyone the world beyond.
1000664086.korean: 용에게, 모두에게 저 너머의 세상을 보여줄게.

1000664087.english: Actually, I feel the same a little.

1000664089.english: Is there something you want to do after the war?
1000664089.korean: 전쟁 후에 하고 싶은 게 있어?

1000664090.english: Something you want to do? Don't hesitate, just say it.
1000664090.korean: 뭔가 하고 싶은 게 있어? 주저하지 말고 말해줘.

1000664100.english: In the story I'm a hero who fights monsters and protects people's hearts. While researching this character I realized a real hero was close to me. That hero is you. Thank you for confessing. I love you too. My hero.
1000664100.korean: 작품 속의 저는 괴물과 싸우고 사람들의 마음을 수호하는 영웅이에요.&n이 캐릭터를 연구할 때 저는 진짜 영웅이 제 가까운 곳에 있다는 것을 알게 되었죠.&n그 영웅이란 바로 당신이에요. 고백해 줘서 고마워요. 저도 당신을 사랑해요. 나의 영웅.

1000664101.english: A vow? No splitting in two? Pfft! Sorry for joking in this atmosphere. You know what? When the Commander is around I naturally smile. Hearing your voice, seeing your face, just being near you. For every time you've made me smile, I'll make you smile too. For a lifetime. I love you, Commander.
1000664101.korean: 서약? 동강은 없어? 푸흡! 이런 분위기에 농담해서 미안해.&n그거 알아? 사령관이 있으면 나는 저절로 웃게 돼. 목소리를 들어도, 얼굴을 봐도, 곁에만 있어도.&n내가 사령관 덕분에 웃은 만큼. 나도 사령관을 웃게 해줄게. 평생 동안. 사랑해, 사령관.

1000664102.english: I was called for a sudden operation meeting and barely managed to free myself from Poi, who had been clinging to me.
1000664102.korean: - 갑작스러운 작전 회의 호출을 받고, 달라붙어있던 포이에게서 간신히 해방됐다.

1000664103.english: From what I hear, it seems like this requires the Commander's judgment...
1000664103.korean: - 듣자 하니 사령관의 판단이 필요한 일이라는 것 같은데……

1000664105.english: The fact that Marie, Leona, Labiata, and even the Doctor are gathered here makes me wonder if there is something to discuss regarding the technical aspects as well.
1000664105.korean: - 마리, 레오나, 라비아타, 거기에 닥터까지 모여있단 건 기술적인  부문에서도 의논할 일이 있는 걸까.

1000664106.english: Now that everyone is here, I will begin the meeting. Regarding the selection of new strategic objectives, however......
1000664106.korean: 모두 모였으니 회의를 시작하겠습니다. 새로운 전략목표 선정에 대해서 다만......

1000664107.english: - Ah, so that's why there is no Khan. The Horde units basically...
1000664107.korean: - 아아, 그래서 칸은 없구나, 호드 부대는 기본적으로...

1000664109.english: I don't discriminate against prey; let me know when a target is set. Anything else?
1000664109.korean: 사냥할 먹잇감은 가리지 않아, 표적이 정해지면 알려줘. 다른 볼일은?

1000664110.english: Is that so? Then I'll return to training.

1000664112.english: - They do not attend meetings unless it is at the stage where actual tactics are being discussed in this way.
1000664112.korean: - 이런 식으로 실제 전술을 얘기하는 단계가 아니면 회의에 나오지 않는다.

1000664113.english: - And one more person, if it is a commander not present here...
1000664113.korean: - 거기에 한 명 더, 이 자리에 없는 지휘관이라면...

1000664115.english: What? Forget it. I'm just going to turn everything into ashes. Please don't waste my time with boring talk.
1000664115.korean: 뭐? 됐고 그냥 죄다 잿더미로 만들어 줄게. 따분한 얘기로 내 시간을 낭비하지 말아 줄래?

1000664116.english: Wait a minute, you tried to decide such an important matter without me? What on earth were you thinking?
1000664116.korean: 잠깐만, 그런 중요한 일을 나 빼고 정하려고 한 거야? 대체 무슨 생각이야?

1000664118.english: It is difficult to know exactly what their true intentions are in these two situations, but today it seems to be the former reason.
1000664118.korean: - 이러한 두 상황에서 어떻게 나올지 도통 속내를 알기 어렵지만, 오늘은 아무래도 전자의 이유인 것 같다.

1000664119.english: Data recovered by Agency 080 recently identified the former Black River research facility. It is not that far from the current location.
1000664119.korean: 얼마 전 080기관이 회수한 데이터에서 구 블랙리버의 연구시설이 판명됐다. 거리는 현재 위치에서 그리 멀지 않아.

1000664120.english: Sleipnir has just returned from reconnaissance. So, I would like to ask for your final decision, Commander.
1000664120.korean: 방금 슬레이프니르가 정찰을 마치고 돌아왔습니다. 그래서 사령관님께서 최종 판단을 내려주셨으면 해서요.

1000664121.english: This is footage filmed by the Colonel from the air. It appears that the main parts of the facility are concealed underground, though...
1000664121.korean: 이게 대령이 공중에서 촬영한 영상이다. 시설의 주요 부분은 지하에 은폐된 모양이다만...

1000664122.english: Are those remnants of Iron Bugs scattered around? There are quite a lot.
1000664122.korean: 주위에 널브러져 있는 건 철충의 잔해야? 꽤 많네.

1000664123.english: Yes, the AGS is still defending even now.
1000664123.korean: 그래, 지금도 AGS가 계속 방어하고 있다.

1000664124.english: And that too with the firepower to defeat this many Iron Bugs.
1000664124.korean: 그것도 이정도로 많은 철충을 물리칠 화력으로 말이지.

1000664125.english: It's difficult to send commands because external access is blocked and security is on alert. Skadi says that if we want to continue, we have to do the "Final Hacking."
1000664125.korean: 외부 접속을 차단해 놓고 경비 중이라 명령어를 보내기는 어려워. 스카디 언니도 계속하려면 “최후의 해킹”으로 해야 한대.

1000664126.english: In other words, that means the attack comes with risks commensurate with its scope. Even so, the reason for summoning the commander for a meeting is...
1000664126.korean: 즉, 공략에 상응하는 리스크가 동반된다는 얘기네. 그런데도 사령관까지 불러서 회의하는 이유는...

1000664127.english: So that means a price to match is hidden inside the facility, right?
1000664127.korean: 그에 걸맞은 대가가 시설 안에 숨겨져 있다는 거겠지?

1000664128.english: That's right! The genetic data of Saman that Orca hasn't recovered yet is stored here.
1000664128.korean: 맞아! 아직 오르카가 회수하지 못한 삼안의 유전자 데이터가 이곳에 보관돼 있어.

1000664129.english: Saman's data in the Black River facility?

1000664130.english: Yeah, a model whose data was lost due to the chaos of the Coalition War.
1000664130.korean: 응, 연합전쟁의 혼란 탓에 데이터가 소실되었던 모델.

1000664133.english: I wonder if that's why you called me.

1000664134.english: I don't know the details about the Keshik model because there isn't any organized information available. However, there is one episode that everyone knows.
1000664134.korean: 케시크 모델에 대한 정보는 정리된 게 없어서 자세히 알지 못한다. 하지만 누구나 알고 있는 에피소드가 하나 있지.

1000664135.english: So, the backstory is that "Khan of Swiftness" is a commander model modified from the "T-4 Kessik," which was originally a mass-produced unit.
1000664135.korean: "신속의 칸"은 원래 양산기였던 "T-4케시크"를 개조한 지휘관 모델이다, 라는 경위 말이네.

1000664136.english: Among them, you, who currently lead the Horde unit, are not a bioroid later mass-produced as a Khan model on the production line, but the very 'person' who was modified as that Keshik.
1000664136.korean: 그중에서도 현재 호드 부대를 이끄는 너는 나중에 생산라인에서 칸 모델로  양산된 바이오로이드가 아닌, 바로 그 케시크로서 개조 받은 ‘당사자’니까.

1000664138.english: What we are currently discussing is whether it is feasible when weighing the risks of targeting the facility in question against the future and strategic validity of the Kesik model for Orca.
1000664138.korean: 지금 의논 중인 건 문제의 시설을 공략하는 리스크와 오르카에 있어서 케시크 모델의 장래적, 전략적 유효성을 저울질해봤을 때 타당한가에 대해서예요.

1000664139.english: Of course it'll be helpful, right? You know it's the prototype of that Khan sister?
1000664139.korean: 당연히 도움 되겠지? 그 칸 언니의 원형이라구?

1000664140.english: If we can just retrieve it, it's practically the same as having one more Khan-nee in Orca!
1000664140.korean: 회수할 수만 있다면 오르카에 칸 언니가 한 명 더 늘어나는 거나 마찬가지야!

1000664141.english: I have doubts about that part too.

1000664142.english: I was worried, so I looked through the data our Valhalla sisters have inherited since the Second Coalition War, and the records of engagement with the 'T-4 Kesik' are being reported even during the time when the 'C-2 Khan' existed.
1000664142.korean: 신경 쓰여서 우리 발할라 자매들이 제2차 연합전쟁기부터 이어받은 데이터를 찾아봤는데, ‘T-4 케시크’ 와의 교전 기록은 'C-2 칸’이 존재했던 시기에도 같이 보고되고 있어.

1000664143.english: ......Hmm. So, are you saying that if every Kesik had the potential the Doctor expects, all the existing Kesik models would have been converted into Khans?
1000664143.korean: ......흠. 즉 닥터가 기대하는 만큼의 잠재력이 모든 케시크에게 있었다면, 기존 케시크 모델이 모두 칸으로 개조되었을 터, 라는 건가?

1000664144.english: That's exactly right. I know it's rude to ask, but wasn't the reason you were modified from Kesik into Khan because a mutant element was discovered that wasn't present in other mass-produced units?
1000664144.korean: 그 말대로야. 실례인 걸 알면서도 묻겠는데, 네가 케시크에서 칸으로 개조 받은 건 다른 양산기에게 없던 돌연변이 요소를 발견했기 때문 아니야?

1000664145.english: Captain Leona is right. I ended up undergoing modification treatment as a result of deviating from the original operational intent of the Kesik model.
1000664145.korean: ......레오나 대장 말이 맞다. 나는 케시크 모델 본래의 운영 의도에서 벗어난 결과, 개조 처치를 받게 됐지.

1000664146.english: As for me, the memories of my days as Kesik now feel like someone else's... but still, I can make an objective assessment from a tactical perspective.
1000664146.korean: 나로서는, 케시크였던 시절의 기억은 이젠 다른 사람의 것처럼 느껴지지만...... 그래도 전술상으로 봤을 때 객관적인 평가는 내릴 수 있다.

1000664147.english: The Keshik model is not currently an effective asset to Orca. Furthermore, it is not worth recovering at the risk involved.
1000664147.korean: 케시크 모델은, 현재 오르카에 유효한 전력은 되지 못해. 거기다 리스크를 감수하면서까지 회수할 가치는 없다.

1000664150.english: Brother has brought countless sisters back to life. But he has never once said that they were 'worthless'!
1000664150.korean: 오빠는 지금까지 수많은 자매를 되살려줬어. 하지만 단 한 번도 ‘가치가 없다’ 라고 말한 적은 없어!

1000664151.english: At the Doctor's desperate voice, I realize once again the gravity of the responsibility I shoulder at Orca......
1000664151.korean: - 닥터의 절실한 목소리에, 다시금 내가 오르카에서 짊어진 책임의 중대함을 깨닫는다......

1000664152.english: want more of my colleagues to see the new world. I want them to meet my brother! As many as possible, even just one!
1000664152.korean: 나는 더 많은 동료들이 새로운 세상을 봐줬으면 해. 우리 오빠와 만나줬으면 해! 한 명이라도 많이!

1000664153.english: I don't want to be forgotten just as data!
1000664153.korean: 그저 데이터인 채로 잊혀지는 건 싫어!

1000664154.english: Doctor, this isn't something to be decided by emotion alone. What's needed is a cool-headed, strategic judgment.
1000664154.korean: 닥터, 이건 감정만으로 얘기할 게 아니야, 필요한 건 냉정한 전략적 판단이다.

1000664156.english: - Labiata gives me a look. I see, this is something I can meddle in.
1000664156.korean: - 라비아타가 눈짓을 보내온다. 그렇군, 이건 내가 참견해도 되는 일이겠지.

1000664157.english: Of course, it’s not entirely absent.

1000664158.english: On the contrary, it is a base that has been defended for such a long time to prevent Iron Bug from approaching.
1000664158.korean: 오히려 이렇게 오랫동안 철충이 접근 못하도록 방어돼 온 거점이에요.

1000664159.english: We can also expect AGS spare parts, automated ammunition production facilities, and food stockpiled in human shelters.
1000664159.korean: AGS의 예비부품에 탄약 자동 생산시설, 인간용 쉘터에 비축된 식량도 기대할 수 있겠죠.

1000664160.english: ......If that is the Commander's judgment, I have no objections. Operational operations in cold environments are our unit's specialty.
1000664160.korean: ......그게 사령관의 판단이라면 이견 없어. 추운 환경에서의 작전행동은 우리 부대 주특기니까.

1000664161.english: Wait, haven't the Sisters of Valhalla been in charge of patrol missions lately? I shouldn't let my soldiers get worn out from the ship's heating. It's about time to give them some serious training.
1000664161.korean: 아니, 발할라의 자매들은 요즘 초계 임무를 도맡았지 않나. 내 병사들이 함내 난방에 찌들게 둬서는 안 되겠지. 슬슬 기합을 넣어줄 때다.

1000664162.english: For some reason, I feel like I can hear the screams of the Leprechaun and Brownie who aren't here. I'm sorry......
1000664162.korean: - 왠지 여기없는 레프리콘과 브라우니의 비명이 들리는 것만 같다. 미안해......

1000664163.english: Then Skadi and I will follow you! Once the main server is secured, leave the rest to us!
1000664163.korean: 그럼 나랑 스카디 언니도 따라갈게! 메인 서버 안전이 확보되면 그 다음은 맡겨줘!

1000664164.english: In that case, I guess I should prepare the command module as well. It looks like things are going to get busy.
1000664164.korean: - 그렇다면 나도 지휘 모듈 준비를 해야겠군, 바빠질 것 같다.

1000664165.english: - Newly restored bioroids undergo strict inspections.
1000664165.korean: - 새롭게 복원된 바이오로이드는 엄격한 검사를 받게 된다.

1000664166.english: - According to Laviata's explanation, in the old era, there were even terrorist attempts to intentionally cause bugs to run wild by implanting them into the genetic seeds themselves, or to operate them as biochemical weapons.
1000664166.korean: - 라비아타의 설명으로는 구시대엔 유전자 씨앗 자체에 버그를 심어서 고의로 폭주시키거나 생화학무기로서 운용하는 테러 시도도 있었다던가.

1000664167.english: - Naturally, Lemonade Omega, who is currently our enemy, must also be aware of this tactic, so we need to exercise careful caution.
1000664167.korean: - 당연히 현재 적대 중인 레모네이드 오메가도 알고 있는 수법일 테니, 우리로서도 세심한 주의가 필요하다.

1000664168.english: First, a physical and mental diagnosis is conducted in a completely isolated blast chamber, and only after passing that is an interview attended by the commander permitted.
1000664168.korean: - 우선 완전히 격리된 내폭실에서 심신 양면으로 진단이 이뤄지고, 그걸 통과해야 겨우 사령관이 입회하는 면담이 허가된다.

1000664169.english: I was secretly looking forward to meeting Kesik in person to see what kind of personality he has, considering he could be called the root of Khan...
1000664169.korean: - 칸의 뿌리라고도 할 수 있는 케시크가 대체 어떤 성격일지, 내심 직접 만나는 걸 기대하고 있었는데...

1000664170.english: Nice to meet you, Commander! My name is T-4 Kesik. It is a great honor to meet you!
1000664170.korean: 처음 뵙겠습니다, 사령관님! 전 T-4케시크라고 합니다. 이렇게 뵙게 되어 굉장히 영광입니다!

1000664171.english: I suppose you could call it innocence, but that smile, which was so completely unexpected, honestly left me bewildered.
1000664171.korean: - 이 천진난만함이랄까, 예상을 너무나도 벗어난 미소가 솔직히 당혹스러웠다.

1000664172.english: Welcome, Kesik. We welcome you. Could you let us know your initial class and specialty?
1000664172.korean: 어서 오세요, 케시크. 우리들은 당신을 환영한답니다. 초기 설정 병과와 특기 직무 능력을 알려주시겠어요?

1000664173.english: Yes! I am a model who was primarily responsible for logistics management and the relief of the wounded. My role is to support our compatriots on the front lines so that they can focus on their mission by improving their survival rate by even just 1%.
1000664173.korean: 네! 저는 주로 병참 관리와 부상병 구호를 담당했던 모델입니다. 전선에 서는 동포의 생존율을 1%라도 향상시켜, 임무에 전념할 수 있도록 서포트 하는 것이 제 역할이랍니다.

1000664176.english: Excuse me, is there a problem?

1000664177.english: Seeing how noticeably flustered Laviata and I looked after hearing our self-introductions, Kesik seemed to become a little anxious.
1000664177.korean: - 자기소개를 들은 나와 라비아타가 눈에 띄게 당황하는 모습에, 케시크는 조금 불안해진 모양이다.

1000664178.english: No, we didn't have any information about your profile... so we were just surprised because it was a bit unexpected.
1000664178.korean: 아뇨, 우리들에겐 당신의 프로필에 대한 정보가 없었어서요... 조금 뜻밖이라 놀랐을 뿐이에요.

1000664179.english: So, before working at Orca, are there any uncomfortable missions or environments you would like to avoid? I received strict orders from the Commander to be as considerate as possible of everyone's working conditions.
1000664179.korean: 그러면 오르카에서 일하기 전에, 거북한 임무나 피하고 싶은 환경 같은 건 있나요? 모든 분들의 노동환경에 대해서 가능한 배려하라고 사령관님께 엄명을 받았거든요.

1000664180.english: This time, Kesik was surprised and a little flustered. I think it's only natural, but bioroids I meet for the first time always seem flustered by this question.
1000664180.korean: - 이번엔 케시크 쪽이 놀라서 조금 당혹스러워 했다. 나로서는 당연한 일이라고 생각하지만, 처음 만나는 바이오로이드는 매번 이 질문에 당황하는 모습을 보인다.

1000664181.english: Um, well, if I may say something so privileged, I mean...
1000664181.korean: 저기, 그게, 그런 배부른 소리를 해도 된다면, 그러니까요......

1000664182.english: think I can utilize my full potential in missions where I can act as a group with as many colleagues as possible. On the other hand, I am very bad at acting alone, so I would appreciate it if you could exclude me from those roles if possible...
1000664182.korean: 가능한 많은 동료와 집단으로 행동할 수 있는 임무 쪽이 제 기능을 살릴 수 있다고 생각해요. 거꾸로 그게, 전 단독행동은 아주 서툴러서, 가능하면 제외해 주셨으면 하고......

1000664184.english: Khan, who is having an interview with me as the leader of the Horde, maintains his usual expressionless face. Even upon comparison, Keshik's quiet demeanor is nowhere to be said to resemble Khan, who is like a sharp blade.
1000664184.korean: - 호드의 대장으로서 함께 면담 중인 칸은, 평소와 다름없는 무표정으로 일관하고 있다. 새삼 비교해봐도 케시크의 얌전한 분위기는, 예리한 칼날 같은 칸과는 도저히 닮았다고 할 수 없다.

1000664185.english: (Wowww, that beautiful woman with face paint is glaring at me so intensely...... Who could it be? The equipment looks like a Horde unit?)
1000664185.korean: (우와아아, 저 페이스 페인팅한 미인 언니, 날 엄청나게 노려보네...... 누굴까? 장비는 호드 부대 같은데?)

1000664186.english: I am Khan, the Captain of the Anger of the Horde, to which you will be assigned. Here in Orca, I have been put in charge of you.
1000664186.korean: 앞으로 네가 배속될 앵거 오브 호드의 대장, 칸이다. 이곳 오르카에서는 내가 너를 맡게 됐지.

1000664187.english: Yes, yup! Please take good care of me!

1000664188.english: ......? Kesik, is this your first time meeting a Khan model?
1000664188.korean: ......? 케시크, 당신은 혹시 칸 모델과 만나는 게 처음인가요?

1000664189.english: Huh? Oh, yes! I'm sorry, but should I say I don't really know... Ugh, eh? Did I perhaps already do something rude???
1000664189.korean: 어라? 아, 네! 죄송하지만 잘 모른다고 말씀드려야 하나, 으으, 에엥? 혹시 저 벌써 뭔가 실례를 저질러버렸나요???

1000664190.english: Hmm, maybe because it was a genetic seed stored in a research facility, it seems like the shared memory update stopped quite early.
1000664190.korean: 으응, 연구시설에서 보관되던 유전자 씨앗이라 그런지, 공유 기억 갱신이 꽤 이른 시기에 중단된 것 같아.

1000664191.english: I heard during the medical examination a little while ago that your remaining memories go up roughly to around the time of the First Coalition War, right?
1000664191.korean: 좀 전에 문진에서 들었는데, 남은 기억은 대략 제1차 연합전쟁 부근까지야, 맞지?

1000664192.english: Ah, yes. I just heard about what happened after that a little while ago. Things like the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) or the Hypnos disease......
1000664192.korean: 아, 네. 그 후에 일어난 일들에 대해서는 좀 전에 막 전해 들었어요. 철충이라던가, 휩노스 병이라던가......

1000664193.english: - In other words, does this Keshik not yet know about the "future" where he gets modified to become a Khan...?
1000664193.korean: - 즉, 이 케시크는 나중에 자신이 개조돼서 칸이 된다는 "장래"에 대해선 아직 모르는 건가......?

1000664194.english: I looked at Laviata, and she nodded as well.

1000664195.english: It is important that she was at a Black River facility rather than Saman. She was probably being kept as a backup for the modification treatment research.
1000664195.korean: 그녀가 삼안이 아닌 블랙리버의 시설에 있었다는 게 중요하네요. 아마 개조 처치 연구를 위한 백업으로써 보관됐었던 거겠죠.

1000664196.english: Did everyone hear the rumor that the Keshik model will be restored if this mission succeeds!
1000664196.korean: 다들 들었어? 이번 임무 성공하면 케시크 모델이 복원된단 소문!

1000664197.english: If that's true, the Horde will gain another companion. Will they be a cute little sibling?
1000664197.korean: 그게 진짜라면 호드에 또 동료가 늘겠네, 귀여운 동생뻘이려나?

1000664198.english: Far from being cute, isn't he the prototype of Captain Khan?

1000664199.english: It might be just as rough as the captain.

1000664200.english: That's right. There is always only one wolf leader. Maybe they'll fight over the leadership position......
1000664200.korean: 맞아. 늑대의 우두머리는 언제나 하나. 어쩌면 대장 자리를 놓고 싸울지도......

1000664201.english: That's going to be totally awesome!

1000664202.english: Right? We're going to have to make a bet on this between us.

1000664203.english: Stop talking nonsense! Captain Khan would absolutely never do that!
1000664203.korean: 바보 같은 얘기 그만하세요! 칸 대장님만은 절대 그럴 리 없거든요!

1000664206.english: There’s no way I wouldn’t be interested. Our little Kesik is Captain Khan’s old self—in other words, a small and precious loli Captain Khan. If he were to actually appear before me, my fantasies would explode into a Big Bang of exponential love lines, causing Bartholin to go berserk and stammer...

1000664207.english: ......I'm overheating. I won't be able to do anything for a while.

1000664208.english: It will cool down if we bury it in the nearby snow. Besides, isn't the operation itself a bit too leisurely?
1000664208.korean: 근처 눈에다가 묻어두면 식겠지. 것보다 작전 자체는 넘 한가하지 않나?

1000664209.english: They said it's flanking cover for the steel line. Once the initial preparations are complete, the Mongoose will definitely be the one to charge in.
1000664209.korean: 스틸라인의 측면 엄호라잖아. 1차적으로 준비가 끝나면 돌입은 분명 몽구스가 할 테고.

1000664210.english: But that's a bit unexpected. This mission isn't just someone else's business for Captain Khan, so I thought he would be a bit more aggressive in his attack.
1000664210.korean: 근데 조금 의외네. 칸 대장님에게도 이번 임무는 남일이 아닐 텐데, 좀 더 적극적으로 쳐들어갈 줄 알았어.

1000664211.english: Your true feelings might be more complicated than you think. Your past self might not be a very pleasant memory—you know, a dark past, you know?
1000664211.korean: 속마음은 생각보다 복잡할지도 몰라. 옛날의 자신이라니 그닥 좋은 추억은 아닐지도, 그 뭐냐, 흑역사라던가?

1000664212.english: Hmm, was I the type to care about things like that?
1000664212.korean: 으음, 그런 걸 신경 쓰는 타입이었던가.

1000664213.english: Whether the rookie Kesik and the captain will get along or end up fighting…
1000664213.korean: 신참 케시크와 대장이 사이좋게 지낼지, 싸우게 될지……

1000664214.english: Hey guys, don't you want to make a bet?

1000664215.english: Stop the chatter over there. Enemy sighting ahead. Remnants of the main force lost are drifting in this direction. We must wipe them out!
1000664215.korean: 거기 잡담 그만하세요. 전방에 적 출현. 본대에서 놓친 잔존부대가 이쪽으로 흘러 들어오고 있어요. 소탕해야죠!

1000664216.english: I'm telling you, Feder really seems to be living life to the fullest.
1000664216.korean: 페더는 진짜 인생 즐겁게 사는 거 같다니까.

1000664217.english: Since we're here, we should enjoy the hunt too. Alright, let's go!
1000664217.korean: 이왕 온 김에 우리도 사냥을 즐겨야겠지. 자, 가자!

1000664218.english: Hey~ It's true that there isn't a single human left here anymore, besides you, Commander... right? Whoa...
1000664218.korean: 저기~ 여기 사령관님 외에 인류가, 이젠 한 명도 없다는 건 역시 사실...... 인 거죠? 우와아......

1000664219.english: I say this cautiously, but the situation is quite desperate......
1000664219.korean: 그렇단 건 조심스럽게 말씀드리는데, 조금 많이 절망적인 상황인 게......

1000664220.english: You are a soldier. You don't need to look at the big picture. Stop worrying about useless things and focus only on the mission assigned to you.
1000664220.korean: 너는 병사다. 대국을 볼 필요는 없어. 쓸데없는 일은 신경 끄고 맡겨진 임무에만 전념해라.

1000664221.english: Yes, yup! I'm so, so sorry!

1000664222.english: Is it really okay to keep these two together? They seem a bit uncomfortable around each other... I'm a little worried about the future.
1000664222.korean: - 이 둘을 같이 둬도 정말 괜찮을까? 서로 약간 거북해하는 듯이 보이는데...... 앞날이 조금 불안하다.

1000664223.english: And speaking of anxiety, I'm also worried about the bridge door that has been creaking and sliding outside for a while now. Won't it break down soon?
1000664223.korean: - 그리고 불안이라면, 좀 전부터 밖에서 삐걱대며 밀리고 있는 함교 문도 걱정이다. 슬슬 망가지지 않을까.

1000664224.english: ......Excuse me? Unless it's just me, it looks like that door over there has been warping for a while now......
1000664224.korean: ......저기? 제 기분 탓이 아니라면, 좀 전부터 저쪽 문이 휘어지고 있는 것 같은데요......

1000664225.english: Yeah, it must be because those guys swarmed in trying to eavesdrop. Those incorrigible guys......
1000664225.korean: 그래, 훔쳐 들으려는 녀석들이 몰려온 탓이겠지. 못 말리는 녀석들......

1000664226.english: Just as Khan sighed, the door finally shattered and he collapsed inside, and the expected faces rushed into the bridge all at once.
1000664226.korean: - 칸이 한숨 쉬는 것과 동시에 결국 문이 박살나며 안쪽으로 쓰러졌고, 예상했던 얼굴들이 함교 안으로 한꺼번에 밀어닥쳤다.

1000664227.english: Nyaaaat! I told you not to push!

1000664228.english: Ah, well, regarding this, I received an anonymous tip saying that we need to urgently check if the Orca's bridge door is really sturdy......
1000664228.korean: 아~ 이건 그게, 오르카 함교 문이 정말 튼튼한지 서둘러 확인해봐야 한다고 익명의 제보를 받아서......

1000664229.english: To start with the conclusion, I am submitting a report stating there is a serious problem with the strength! I mean, but it's too weak.
1000664229.korean: 결론부터 말하자면 강도에 중대한 문제 있음이라고 보고 올림! 아니, 근데 너무 약하잖아.

1000664230.english: Is it because Camel's butt is too big......

1000664233.english: Keshik looks dumbfounded, having suddenly faced the chaos and destruction of the Anger of the Horde right from their first meeting. ......The future looks very uncertain.
1000664233.korean: - 첫 만남부터 갑작스레 앵거 오브 호드의 혼돈과 파괴를 마주한 케시크는 어안이 벙벙한 모습이다. ......앞날이 굉장히 불안하다.

1000664234.english: Well, I suppose this saves me the trouble of introducing them later. If you know about the First Coalition War, you'll recognize these four, right? Unlike the models of the past...
1000664234.korean: 뭐, 나중에 소개할 수고가 줄었다고 생각하지. 제1차 연합전쟁을 알고 있다면 여기 있는 4명은 알아보겠지? 그녀들은 구시대 모델과는 다르게...

1000664235.english: Captain! Let's skip the nonsense explanations! The fastest way to become close enough to entrust your lives to each other on the battlefield is to take a good puff of gunpowder smoke.
1000664235.korean: 대장! 잡스러운 설명은 제끼자고! 전장에서 서로 목숨을 맡기는 사이가 되려면 화약 연기 한번 뿅 가게 빨아 주는 게 제일 빠르니까.

1000664236.english: Feather has already prepared the simulator. Alright, shall we go? It’s a mock battle, but the difficulty is set to Horde Special. We’ll be able to see your skills and our tactics all at once.
1000664236.korean: 페더가 이미 시뮬레이터를 준비해 뒀어. 자, 갈까? 모의전이라지만 난이도는 호드 스페셜 설정이야. 네 솜씨나 우리 전술, 모두 한번에 알 수 있을 거야.

1000664238.english: A mock battle? What, so suddenly!?

1000664239.english: You probably intend to act coy for now while you're a newcomer, but that makes us uncomfortable.
1000664239.korean: 신참인 동안에 일단 내숭 떨어 두려는 속셈이겠지만, 그래서는 우리가 불편하거든.

1000664240.english: I was really looking forward to seeing how the T-4 Kesik, who opened the beginning of our legend, would fight! I also wanted to see what the Horde tactics were like 100 years ago, you know. Please go easy on me, Senior!
1000664240.korean: 우리 전설의 시작을 열었던 T-4 케시크가 어떻게 싸울지 엄청 기대하고 있었어! 100년 전의 호드 전술이 어땠을지 보고 싶기도 했고 말이지, 살살 부탁할게, 선배!

1000664241.english: Oh no! I still have absolutely no idea what happened! That's impossible!
1000664241.korean: 그런! 전 아직 뭐가 어떻게 된 건지 전혀 모르는데! 무리에요오!

1000664242.english: Keshik is already on the verge of tears. However, judging by the atmosphere among the Horde troops, this is no longer a situation I can resolve. The last hope is Khan...
1000664242.korean: - 케시크는 벌써 눈물을 글썽인다. 하지만 호드 부대원들의 분위기를 보니, 이건 이미 내가 수습할 수 있는 상황이 아니다. 마지막 희망은 칸인데......

1000664243.english: I see. That would be the fastest way to blend into the unit.

1000664244.english: Kesik, this is your first mission.

1000664245.english: Engage in a mock battle with everyone and assess the current state of the Anger of the Horde. Go into it without any preconceptions, for everything has changed over the past hundred years.
1000664245.korean: 모두와 함께 모의전을 치르고 앵거 오브 호드의 현 상황을 확인해라. 선입관은 모두 버리고 임하도록. 이 100년 동안 모든 게 바뀌었으니 말이다.

1000664247.english: This is different from standard procedure, but is that alright, Commander?

1000664248.english: Hmm... well, if it's a simulator battle, there won't be any casualties, so it might be perfect for bonding. I hope Kesik gets used to his new life in Orca soon, too.
1000664248.korean: - 으~음...... 뭐, 시뮬레이터 모의전이라면 부상자가 나올 일도 없고, 친목을 다지기엔 안성맞춤일지도 모른다. 케시크도 어서 오르카에서의 새로운 생활에 익숙해졌으면 하고.

1000664249.english: Yay! As expected of the Commander. I told you I'm falling for you!

1000664255.english: can't keep up at all...... Everyone is too fast......
1000664255.korean: 전혀 따라가질 못하겠어...... 모두 너무 빨라......

1000664256.english: Hmm... we usually feel like this... are we perhaps very different from the old Horde?
1000664256.korean: 음~ 우리는 평소에도 이런 느낌인데...... 혹시 옛날 호드와는 많이 다른 거야?

1000664257.english: Yes. I had a bad feeling about Mr. Warwolf's hat and dual pistols... It's completely different from the training I've been receiving. I mean, no matter how much I think about it, it doesn't make sense!
1000664257.korean: 네. 워울프 씨의 모자와 쌍권총에서 뭔가 안 좋은 예감은 들었는데...... 제가 받던 훈련과는 전혀 달라요. 아니, 아무리 생각해도 말이 안 되잖아요!

1000664258.english: All abandoning the base and launching a mass charge! Even if it's just a simulator, there's a limit to how reckless you can be, isn't there? Especially Mr. Camel, who took the lead, his hit rate has gone over 300%...
1000664258.korean: 다 같이 거점을 버리고 일제 돌격이라니! 아무리 시뮬레이터라지만 뒤가 없는 것도 정도가 있잖아요? 특히 선두로 나선 카멜 씨는 피탄율이 300%를 넘어가 버리고오오......

1000664259.english: Ah, well, that's because I was the boss today.
1000664259.korean: 아~ 그건 말이지, 오늘은 내가 대장 역할이었으니까.

1000664260.english: It doesn't work that way in actual combat.

1000664261.english: It's just a mock battle between us, so no matter who takes on the "leader role," it's inevitable that we're going to get chewed out.
1000664261.korean: 우리끼리 하는 모의전이니까. 누가 "대장 역할"을 맡든 한 소리 듣게 되는 건 어쩔 수 없어.

1000664262.english: It is unreasonable to even try to follow Captain Khan in the first place.
1000664262.korean: 애초에 칸 대장을 따라 한다는 자체가 무리이니 말이지.

1000664263.english: Is Captain Khan really that strong? Strong enough to always charge in alone?
1000664263.korean: 칸 대장님은 그렇게나 강한가요? 언제나 혼자 돌격할 정도로?

1000664264.english: Why are you so slow and weak when you say things like that?
1000664264.korean: 그런 말하는 너는 왜 그리 느려터지고 약해빠졌어?

1000664266.english: The ridiculous part is over here. I thought we were all going to roll around until we were knocked out.
1000664266.korean: 어이 없는 건 이쪽이야. 우리 모두 뻗을 정도로 구를 줄 알았는데 말이지.

1000664267.english: Was it true that you specialized in rear support, not a joke?
1000664267.korean: 후방지원 전문이란 거 농담 아니고 진짜였어?

1000664268.english: What's the point of arguing with Keshik about that? We're the ones who misunderstood.
1000664268.korean: 그걸 케시크에게 따져서 뭐해. 오해했던 건 우리잖아.

1000664270.english: Rumors that you are on par with Captain Khan were circulating a step ahead of time.
1000664270.korean: 네가 칸 대장과 동급으로 강하다는 소문이 한발 앞서 돌았거든.

1000664272.english: Well, anyone who takes the rumors spreading between us at face value is a fool.
1000664272.korean: 뭐, 우리 사이에 퍼진 소문을 곧이곧대로 믿는 녀석이 바보인 거지.

1000664273.english: If you were to ask if models like Lilith or Alexandra are all psychos who kill their comrades, that is not the case at all.
1000664273.korean: 리리스나 알렉산드라 같은 모델이 모두 동료를 죽이는 사이코인가 하면 전혀 그렇지 않고.

1000664276.english: I suppose it means a Kesik model who performed incredibly well has appeared......
1000664276.korean: 뭔가 엄청난 활약을 벌였던 케시크 모델이 나왔다, 라는 걸까요......

1000664277.english: (......Hey, what should I do? Should I tell you about Captain Khan?)

1000664278.english: (No, wouldn't he get even more discouraged if he heard that?)
1000664278.korean: (아니, 그걸 들으면 얘가 더 풀 죽지 않겠어?)

1000664279.english: (It seems a bit complicated even between the parties involved, so wouldn't it be better for a third party like us not to bring it up unnecessarily?)
1000664279.korean: (당사자끼리도 뭔가 복잡한 모양이던데, 우리 같은 제삼자가 괜히 말 꺼내지 않는 게 낫지 않을까.)

1000664281.english: - I check the logs of the Horde unit's mock battle from earlier with Khan. This looks a bit... like it needs a countermeasure.
1000664281.korean: - 칸과 함께 좀 전 호드 부대의 모의전 로그를 확인한다. 이건 조금...... 대책이 필요해 보인다.

1000664283.english: I don't think they are underpowered as Khan initially assessed. In fact, in other units, Andvari and Silky are playing important roles by supporting the front lines.
1000664283.korean: - 처음 칸이 내린 평가처럼 전력 미달이라고는 생각하지 않는다. 실제로 다른 부대에서는 안드바리나 실키가 전선을 받쳐주며 중요한 역할을 맡고 있으니까.

1000664284.english: It's just that a problem arose because you sent them charging in alongside a native attacker like a Warwolf, just like this time......
1000664284.korean: - 그저 이번처럼 워울프 같은 태생 공격기와 함께 돌격시키니 문제가 생겼을 뿐이지......

1000664285.english: That is the problem. Our current tactics don't match Kesik's existing way of operating at all.
1000664285.korean: 그게 문제다. 지금 우리 전술은 케시크의 기존 운영법과는 전혀 맞지 않아.

1000664286.english: She, too, must feel a sense of belonging to the Horde due to her innate nature. However, Orca's Horde is completely different from the Three-Eyed Horde of 100 years ago. I ended up changing it.
1000664286.korean: 그녀 또한 태생적인 사양으로 호드에 소속감이 있겠지. 하지만 오르카의 호드는 100년 전 삼안의 호드와는 전혀 다르다. 내가, 바꾸고 말았지.

1000664287.english: The Anger of the Horde has achieved numerous victories using a tactic that is difficult to view as a modern military force: a commander of unrivaled strength charges in to disrupt the enemy while other members provide cover. All of this was possible thanks to Khan's exceptionally special abilities.
